prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年内蒙古理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为约9072名→14582名→11735名→13196名→12270名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025年基准位次约12270名，较2024年有所回升（前移约926名），但近5年波动幅度较大（极差约5510名），反映该校在内蒙古的录取位次受大小年效应影响明显；2021–2025年该校在内蒙古理科/物理类招生计划均为25人，2026年物理类计划缩减至24人，较2025年减少1人（缩招4%），招生名额小幅收紧，对竞争有一定加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第60名，是独立医科大学中唯一的211院校，层次稳固，对考生持续具有较强吸引力；该校在2021–2026年声誉舆情数据中均无显著正负面记录，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第78位（评价为“一般”），短视频平台曝光量中等，未见明显报考热度异常信号；投档异常数据中亦无该校断档记录，录取走势相对稳定；天津医科大学拥有临床医学（A-）、基础医学（B+）、药学（B+）、护理学（B+）等优势学科，虽第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校，但作为211医科院校，其临床医学、口腔医学等专业在全国具有较高认可度，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业在2023–2024年专业热度分析中持续处于“高热推荐”或“推荐”级别，医学报考热度居高不下；内蒙古2026年普通高考总人数约154000人，较2025年（约116360人）大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算约111881人，较2025年（83716人）增长约33.6%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争明显加剧；2026年；天津医科大学位于天津市，与内蒙古地理位置较近，属于华北地区，地域偏好适中；该校在内蒙古招生计划占比较小（约24–25人），属跨省招生，无显著本地保护效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12270名、2026年计划小幅缩招（-4%）、内蒙古考生总数大幅增长（+33.6%）以及医学类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次前移。预测最低位次约11776名，区间11276–12276名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11276–12276名内的考生，建议以二档专业（临床医学、眼视光医学、麻醉学等）为主攻方向，一档专业（5+3一体化长学制）作为冲刺，三档专业（护理学、康复治疗学等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（11276名以上）可重点冲刺一档王牌长学制专业；位次接近区间上限（12276名附近）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Inner Mongolia science (including physics category) were approximately 9072 → 14582 → 11735 → 13196 → 12270, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 12270, which has rebounded compared to 2024 (moving forward by about 926 places), but the fluctuation range over the past 5 years is large (range about 5510), reflecting that the admission rankings of this university in Inner Mongolia are significantly affected by the big-small year effect; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for science/physics category in Inner Mongolia was 25 students each year, and in 2026, the physics category plan is reduced to 24 students, a decrease of 1 student compared to 2025 (a 4% reduction), with a slight tightening of enrollment quotas, which has a certain intensifying effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 60th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings. It is the only 211 university among independent medical universities, with a solid level and strong continuous attraction for candidates; from 2021 to 2026, there were no significant positive or negative records in the reputation public opinion data, with a stable reputation; the overall ranking on Douyin popularity is 78th (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; there are also no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal filing data, and the admission trend is relatively stable; Tianjin Medical University has advantageous disciplines such as Clinical Medicine (A-), Basic Medicine (B+), Pharmacy (B+), and Nursing (B+). Although the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university, as a 211 medical university, its Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other majors have high recognition nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have been consistently at the 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' level in the 2023–2024 major popularity analysis, with medical application popularity remaining high; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Inner Mongolia general college entrance examination is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 116,360), and the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 111,881, an increase of about 33.6% compared to 2025 (83,716), with a significant expansion in the candidate pool and intensified competition; in 2026; Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, which is geographically close to Inner Mongolia, belonging to the North China region, with moderate regional preference; the enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia is relatively small (about 24–25 students), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12270, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-4%), the significant increase in the total number of Inner Mongolia candidates (+33.6%), and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with rankings moving forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 11776, with a range of 11276–12276.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 11276–12276 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Clinical Medicine, Optometry and Ophthalmology, Anesthesiology, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (5+3 integrated long-term programs) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Rehabilitation Therapy, etc.) as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (above 11276) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship long-term programs; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (around 12276) are advised to mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower rankings.
